name: projectmem
desc: Local-first memory layer for AI coding agents. Captures issues, attempts, decisions, and cross-project library gotchas — your AI starts experienced, not amnesi…
descFull: Local-first memory layer for AI coding agents. Captures issues, attempts, decisions, and cross-project library gotchas — your AI starts experienced, not amnesiac. Native MCP server verified across Claude Desktop, Cursor, Antigravity, and Codex. 100% local · no cloud · no telemetry · MIT.
